---
title: "Rāg Behāg"
subtitle: "*Mere danda dala*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Suratasen &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Jhāpatāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> mere danda dala sāje daśaratha-suta rāma,  
> padama daśa koṭita koṭi kopa dhāyo

**Antarā**

> lagana cahu ora vikala ghana haka de  
> banka gaḍa laṅka ko caḍhi dabāyo

**Sanchārī**

> ghananāda rāvaṇa aura kumbhakarana  
> palaka saṃhāra kara, avadha me sītā lāyo

**Ābhog**

> nagara se loga saba sumana barakhā vana  
> nirakhata suratasena ānanda pāyo

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Jhāpatāl is a 10-beat cycle divided as **2 + 3 + 2 + 3** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the ten columns correspond to beats 1–10, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 3, **O** (khālī) at beat 6, and **3** at beat 8. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | N | N |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **me** | **re** |
| $\tr{S}$ | - | - | - | $\lb{ND}$ | P | M | G | m | G |
| **da** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **nda** | **da** | **la** | **sā** | **-** | **je** |
| G | m | $\lb{PM}$ | P | m | G | G | $\lb{RS}$ | S | S |
| **da** | **śa** | **ra** | **-** | **tha** | **su** | **ta** | **ra** | **-** | **ma** |
| $\lb{S\mn{N}}$ | S | S | G | m | P | P | P | N | N |
| **pa** | **da** | **ma** | **da** | **śa** | **ko** | **ṭi** | **ta** | **ko** | **ti** |
| $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\lb{\sps{D}N}$ | P | P | - | - |
| **ko** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **pa** | **dhā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| P | P | P | N | N | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\lb{\sps{\tr{R}}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - |
| **la** | **ga** | **na** | **ca** | **hu** | **o** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | D | $\tr{S}$ | N | - |
| **vi** | **ka** | **la** | **gha** | **na** | **ha** | **-** | **ka** | **de** | **-** |
| P | P | P | N | N | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\lb{\sps{\tr{R}}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - |
| **la** | **ga** | **na** | **ca** | **hu** | **o** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | D | $\tr{S}$ | N | - |
| **vi** | **ka** | **la** | **gha** | **na** | **ha** | **-** | **ka** | **de** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | - | $\lb{\tr{G}\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | - |
| **ba** | **-** | **nka** | **ga** | **ḍa** | **la** | **-** | **ṅka** | **ko** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{R}}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{D}N}$ | - | P | - | - |
| **ca** | **ḍhi** | **da** | **bā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | S | $\lb{SP}$ | - | P | P | $\lb{MG}$ | m | G | - |
| **gha** | **na** | **nā** | **-** | **da** | **rā** | **-** | **va** | **ṇa** | **-** |
| G | m | $\lb{PM}$ | $\lb{\sps{D}m}$ | - | G | G | R | S | - |
| **au** | **-** | **ra** | **ku** | **-** | **mbha** | **ka** | **ra** | **na** | **-** |
| S | $\mn{N}$ | $\mn{P}$ | $\mn{N}$ | - | S | - | S | G | G |
| **pa** | **la** | **ka** | **saṃ** | **-** | **hā** | **-** | **ra** | **ka** | **ra** |
| G | m | $\lb{PM}$ | P | $\lb{\sps{P}D}$ | m | - | G | $\lb{-R}$ | S |
| **a** | **va** | **dha** | **me** | **sī** | **tā** | **-** | **lā** | **-** | **yo** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .jhapatal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   | **O** |   | **3** |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| P | P | N | N | - | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **na** | **ga** | **ra** | **se** | **-** | **lo** | **-** | **ga** | **sa** | **ba** |
| $\lb{\sps{P}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | D | $\tr{S}$ | N | - |
| **su** | **ma** | **na** | **ba** | **ra** | **khā** | **-** | **va** | **na** | **-** |
| P | P | N | N | - | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **na** | **ga** | **ra** | **se** | **-** | **lo** | **-** | **ga** | **sa** | **va** |
| $\lb{\sps{P}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | D | $\tr{S}$ | N | - |
| **su** | **ma** | **na** | **va** | **ra** | **khā** | **-** | **va** | **na** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{P}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}S}$ | - | N |
| **ni** | **ra** | **kha** | **ta** | **su** | **ra** | **ta** | **se** | **-** | **na** |
| $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{G}\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | N | $\lb{\sps{D}N}$ | - | P | - | - |
| **ā** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **nda** | **pā** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **-** |

:::
